headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on Wynn Resorts, Lowers Price Target to $140
summary: Stifel  analyst Steven Wieczynski   maintains Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $150 to $140.
